title: Photon-Related Elliptic Azimuthal Asymmetry and Photon-Hadron Correlations with an Isolation Cut in Au+Au Collisions at √sNN = 200 GeV at RHIC-PHENIX
author: Danley, Tyler
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The purpose of this dissertation is to measure isolated photon-hadron correlations and  v 2   of isolated photons and  π 0  . Hence we have developed a method of obtaining direct photons which uses an isolation cut. We have derived single and two-particle second order event plane correlation functions including the isolation cut. These equations are used to extract  v 2   of isolated photons and  π 0   in Au+Au collisions at center-of-mass energy 200 GeV at RHIC-PHENIX.
